ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chrom" TEXT /* Chromosome the gene is located on */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand the gene is located on */,
  "txStart" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "txEnd" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "cdsStart" INTEGER /* Start position of the coding sequence (CDS) */,
  "cdsEnd" INTEGER /* End position of the CDS */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "gene_status" TEXT /* Status of the gene (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "gene_source" TEXT /* Source of the gene data (e.g., ENSEMBL, NCBI) */,
  "gene_version" TEXT /* Version of the gene data */,
  "gene_length" INTEGER /* Length of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the transcript belongs to */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the transcript */,
  "transcript_biotype" TEXT /* Type of transcript (e.g., mRNA, lncRNA) */,
  "transcript_status" TEXT /* Status of the transcript (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "transcript_source" TEXT /* Source of the transcript data (e.g., ENSEMBL, NCBI) */,
  "transcript_version" TEXT /* Version of the transcript data */,
  "transcript_length" INTEGER /* Length of the transcript */,
  "transcript_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methylation_sites" (
  "methylation_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methylation site */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the methylation site belongs to */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the methylation site on the chromosome */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the methylation site */,
  "methylation_status" TEXT /* Status of the methylation (e.g., methylated, unmethylated) */,
  "methylation_type" TEXT /* Type of methylation (e.g., CpG, CHG, CHH) */,
  "methylation_source" TEXT /* Source of the methylation data (e.g., WGBS, RRBS) */,
  "methylation_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the methylation site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methylation_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methylation_sites_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "user_contact_info" TEXT /* Additional contact information (e.g., phone number, address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., gene name, description) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created or updated */,
  "annotation_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or updated the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_annotation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcript_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., transcript name, description) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created or updated */,
  "annotation_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or updated the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcript_annotations_annotation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcript_annotations_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methylation_annotation" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "methylation_site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the methylation site being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., methylation status) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created or updated */,
  "annotation_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or updated the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methylation_annotation_annotation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methylation_annotation_methylation_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("methylation_site_id") REFERENCES methylation_sites ("methylation_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., FASTA, FASTQ, BAM) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., FASTA, FASTQ, BAM) */,
  "file_md5" TEXT /* MD5 checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file on the server */,
  "file_uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the file has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_file_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("file_uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
